summary: Neocortica-Session parity dashboard for v1.3 review surfaces.

capabilities.label: Session preflight
capabilities.safety_boundary: local checks only; remote execution disabled

capabilities.label: Context pack builder
capabilities.safety_boundary: safe context files only; secrets and raw data excluded

capabilities.label: Fake transfer
capabilities.safety_boundary: local copy only; no live SSH

capabilities.label: Return verifier
capabilities.safety_boundary: proposed updates only; no automatic ledger write

capabilities.label: Workflow replay
capabilities.safety_boundary: full fake chain; no remote command execution

deferred.label: Remote execution orchestration
deferred.reason: unsafe by default; requires separate design and safety review

deferred.label: SSH / tmux / provision
deferred.reason: not required for fake/default parity and not enabled by v1.3

deferred.label: Automatic pod cleanup
deferred.reason: would require live remote lifecycle ownership

safety_boundaries: no secrets in fixtures or reports
no raw data in context packs
future_roadmap: optional live transfer review in a dedicated live-test round
